title: zanthoxylum simulans var. imperforatum
intro: Zanthoxylum simulans var. imperforatum, also known as Sichuan prickly ash, is a variety of shrub or small tree native to China, characterized by its prickly branches and yellow flowers. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its rich content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum simulans var. imperforatum include relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal medicine, it is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
